issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is limited to Linux systemd environments, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: Node.js service with auto-restart and resource limits
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes a unit file with Restart=always, RestartSec, MemoryMax/CPUQuota, NoNewPrivileges/ProtectSystem hardening, and runs daemon-reload before enable — all from the skill; baseline omits hardening and resource limits.

scenarios.name: Replace nightly cron job with a systemd timer
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses paired .timer + .service with OnCalendar, Persistent=true, Type=oneshot, and enables with systemctl enable --now backup.timer plus list-timers verification per the skill; baseline keeps cron or invents flags not documented.
